question.text: A trader buys 5 lots of EURUSD futures at 1.0825 and closes at 1.0790. What is the loss in USD and in INR (USD/INR = 83)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Loss = 5 × 1000 × (1.0790 - 1.0825) = 5000 × (-0.0035) = -USD 17.50. INR equivalent = 17.50 × 83 = INR 1,452.50 ≈ INR 1,453. **The Trap:** P&L for EURUSD accrues in USD (quote currency), not EUR. Then convert to INR for settlement. **Cross-Exam Context:** Cross-currency P&L with INR conversion is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** All cross-currency futures in India settle in INR — USD or JPY P&L is converted using FBIL reference rates.
